sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21574" key="gamoklope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γᾰμο-κλοπέω</orth>, <sense id="n21574.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have illicit intercourse</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
